understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve the KA59 puzzle game by placing selectable pieces onto goal tiles (+). A level had multiple selectable pieces and multiple goal tiles, and all goals needed to be occupied simultaneously to trigger a WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used a grid with 3 pixels per cell. The player could select different pieces using CLICK with pixel coordinates. Pushing blocks was possible, and walls sometimes blocked movement unexpectedly. Movement_blocked hints were heuristic and not always accurate. The level required coordinating multiple pieces to cover all goal tiles.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve the KA59 puzzle game by placing selectable pieces onto goal tiles (+). A level had multiple selectable pieces and multiple goal tiles, and all goals needed to be occupied simultaneously to trigger a WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used a grid with 3 pixels per cell. The player could select different pieces using CLICK with pixel coordinates. Pushing blocks was possible, and walls sometimes blocked movement unexpectedly. Movement_blocked hints were heuristic and not always accurate. The level required coordinating multiple pieces to cover all goal tiles.
